_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Bun.js
author: support@nyxel.my.id
description: Host any Bun.js application (Elysia, Hono, plain Bun) with auto-update, private repo support, production/development modes, optional Cloudflare Tunnel, and .env injection.
startup: bash -c "mkdir -p /home/container/.pterodactyl && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/bunjs/entrypoint.sh -o /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh || { echo '[EGG] Failed to download entrypoint!'; exit 1; } && chmod +x /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh && bash /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh"

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Bun.js Installation Script — nyxel v2.0

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl unzip

# Install Bun if not available
if ! command -v bun &>/dev/null; then
  echo "[INSTALL] Installing Bun..."
  curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
  export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"
fi

echo "[INSTALL] Bun version: $(bun --version)"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.pterodactyl
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/bunjs/entrypoint.sh -o /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
echo "[INSTALL] entrypoint.sh downloaded."

cd /mnt/server

if [ -n "${GIT_URL}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    GIT_URL="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_URL} | sed 's|https://||')"
  fi
  if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Git repo exists — pulling latest..."
    git reset --hard && git pull
  else
    echo "[INSTALL] Cloning repository..."
    find /mnt/server -mindepth 1 -not -path '/mnt/server/.pterodactyl*' -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
      git clone --depth 1 "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo
    else
      git clone --depth 1 --single-branch --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo
    fi
    cp -a /tmp/repo/. /mnt/server/ && rm -rf /tmp/repo
  fi
  if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Installing dependencies..."
    cd /mnt/server && bun install
    echo "[INSTALL] Dependencies installed."
  fi
else
  echo "[INSTALL] No GIT_URL — upload files via File Manager."
fi

echo "[INSTALL] Done."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: HTTPS URL to your Bun.js Git repository (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo). Leave empty to skip cloning — upload files manually via File Manager.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and run (e.g. main, master, production). Leave empty to use the repository default branch.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to pull latest commits on every startup. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: GitHub/GitLab username for private repositories. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for private repositories (https://github.com/settings/tokens). Requires at least 'repo' scope. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Run Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' to run with Bun directly. Set to 'development' for bun --watch hot-reload mode. Recommended: production for live servers.

variables.name: Entry Point
variables.description: Main file to run (e.g. src/index.ts, index.ts, server.ts). Auto-detected from package.json 'main' field if empty.

variables.name: Build Command
variables.description: Custom build command (e.g. 'bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist'). Auto-runs 'bun run build' if a build script exists in package.json. Leave empty for auto-detection.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Optional. Cloudflare Tunnel token from your Zero Trust dashboard (Networks > Tunnels > Configure > Run token). Leave empty to disable the tunnel.
